meaning: n.波美拉尼亚丝毛狗(一种尖嘴竖耳的光滑毛小狗)
examples: Mark Spitz was a great athlete.
Notably a butterfly specialist, Spitz was also successful in the freestyle.
In most marriages there is barely enough money to support one family in one country, notes Ms Spitz.
That would break the fabled record of seven that Mark Spitz accumulated in 1972.
But 20 years later, all of Spitz's record times were not just broken, but shattered.
